summary: Premium corporate website for FarmSiddhi - an Indian agriculture and processed food export company. Multi-page site with modern, professional design featuring Home, About Us, Products, Farmer Network, Exports, and Contact pages. Silver green and silver brown color palette on white background. B2B export-oriented tone. E-commerce features being added to the existing site.
architectural_notes: Multi-page corporate website structure with 6 main pages
Design: Modern, minimal, trustworthy - suitable for B2B/investors/international clients
Color palette: Silver green and silver brown on white background
Professional footer with logo, contact placeholders, and social media icons
Product categories now include Makhana in addition to Rice, Wheat, Pulses, Spices, and Processed Food Products
Each product category should have an associated image
Clicking on a product opens a detailed view showing specifications and pricing in INR
Product detail pages should display nutritional information per gram in addition to specifications and pricing
Home page product categories section should include Makhana alongside other categories
known_issues: Product detail pages not displaying content properly ('not showing up to the mark')
Deployment error occurred during network deployment
Product page has no products available to add to cart - e-commerce cart integration with product data is broken
Logo image not loading correctly in the Navigation and/or Footer components
E-commerce features (cart, checkout, order confirmation, add-to-cart) appear to have been removed in a recent deployment and need to be restored
Admin page not loading after recent deployment
Product not found error when selecting a product from the Products page
Sub product categories not completely listed and no products showing on product pages in version 31

existing_features.title: Create a Home page with a hero section displaying the tagline 'Empowering Farmers. Enabling Global Markets.', a short introduction about FarmSiddhi, an 'Our Services' section listing Aggregation, Quality Control, Processing, Packaging, and Logistics, a Product Categories Overview section, a Farm to Export Supply Chain Model visualization or explanation, and a 'Partner With Us' call-to-action button

Create an About Us page with three sections: Vision ('Building a transparent farm-to-global-market ecosystem'), Mission ('Enable farmers to access fair pricing and global demand'), and Business Model ('Digital aggregation and supply chain enablement')
Create a Products page displaying five product categories: Rice, Wheat, Pulses, Spices, and Processed Food Products, each presented as a distinct card or section
Create a Farmer Network page with five content sections: Direct Procurement, Fair Pricing, Aggregation Platform, Quality Standardization, and Supply Chain Digitization
Create an Exports page with five content sections: Quality Assurance, Packaging Standards, Logistics Management, Global Trade Support, and Compliance Ready Operations

Create a Contact Us page with a form containing the following fields: Name (text input), Email (email input), Phone Number (tel input), Message (textarea), and User Type (dropdown or radio with options: Farmer, Buyer, Distributor)
Implement navigation allowing users to move between all six pages: Home, About Us, Products, Farmer Network, Exports, and Contact Us
Create a professional footer component appearing on all pages with placeholders for: FarmSiddhi Logo, Business Email, Phone Number, Office Address, and Social Media Icons

Apply a modern, trustworthy, and minimal design aesthetic across all pages using a color palette of silver green and silver brown on a white background, avoiding overly rustic or cartoonish farm styles to present a professional supply chain and export brand suitable for international B2B clients and investors
Update the frontend ContactUs page to display a success message after form submission confirming that the data has been saved to the backend
Create an Admin page that displays all contact form submissions in a table or list format, showing Name, Email, Phone Number, Message, and User Type fields for each submission
Add Makhana as a new product category to the Products page alongside Rice, Wheat, Pulses, Spices, and Processed Food Products
Add representative images to all product category cards on the Products page (Rice, Wheat, Pulses, Spices, Processed Food Products, and Makhana)
Make product category cards on the Products page clickable, navigating to a detailed product specification page that displays the product name, full specifications, and price in rupees (₹)
Create frontend React Query hooks to fetch product details from the backend, enabling data retrieval for the product detail pages
Update the ProductDetail frontend page (frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx) to display nutritional information per gram in a dedicated section below or alongside the specifications table

Update the ProductDetail frontend page (frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx) to display the product's individual image at the top of the page or in a prominent position alongside the product information

Update the Home page (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx) Product Categories section to include a Makhana card with image, matching the existing card layout for Rice, Wheat, Pulses, Spices, and Processed Food Products

Update the ProductDetail frontend page (frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx) to display all product variants with their images in a dedicated 'Product Variants' section, showing each variant's name and image in a grid or card layout below the main product information

Fix the useGetProductByCategory query hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to correctly fetch product data using the productId parameter, ensuring it matches the category identifiers used when creating product links on the Products page

Verify that product category identifiers used in Links on the Products page (frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx) match the category values stored in the backend ProductDetail records, ensuring consistency between navigation and data retrieval

Add console logging or error messages to the ProductDetail page (frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx) to help diagnose routing issues, displaying the productId being requested and the query response status

Add a watermark image of a tractor in a field to all pages (Home, About Us, Products, ProductDetail, Farmer Network, Exports, Contact Us, and Admin) by rendering the generated tractor watermark as a semi-transparent fixed or absolute positioned element that appears subtly in the background without obstructing content
Remove the existing tractor watermark background image reference from frontend/src/index.css
Update the watermark background in frontend/src/index.css to use the uploaded FarmSiddhi logo image (ChatGPT Image Feb 22, 2026, 08_54_14 PM.png) as the new watermark across all pages

Update the Products page (frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx) to display product variants with images for each product category (Rice, Wheat, Pulses, Spices, Processed Food Products, and Makhana), matching the variant structure currently shown on the Home page

Update the watermark styling in frontend/src/index.css to reduce opacity by 30 percent (making it darker) and ensure the watermark fits properly within the page dimensions without overflow or distortion
Verify that the frontend build completes successfully with all dependencies resolved, including React, TanStack Router, React Query, Tailwind CSS, and Internet Identity integration
Ensure all generated images referenced in the frontend code exist in the frontend/public/assets/generated directory to prevent missing resource errors during deployment
Redeploy the application to the Internet Computer network after all deployment errors have been resolved and verified
Update the watermark styling in frontend/src/index.css to reduce the opacity by an additional 50 percent from the current level (making it significantly darker and more visible)

Replace the current watermark logo image with the new uploaded FarmSiddhi logo image (image_8a526262-3a20-4994-9dc2-1df6b5d6410e.png) in frontend/src/index.css, ensuring the new logo is used as the watermark background across all pages

Replace the existing FarmSiddhi logo in the Navigation component (frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx) with the uploaded logo image (image_8a526262-3a20-4994-9dc2-1df6b5d6410e-1.png), ensuring it displays correctly in both desktop and mobile navigation views

Replace the existing FarmSiddhi logo in the Footer component (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx) with the uploaded logo image (image_8a526262-3a20-4994-9dc2-1df6b5d6410e-1.png), ensuring consistent branding across the site

Increase the logo size in the Navigation component (frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx) by adjusting the width and height attributes or CSS classes applied to the logo image element (image_8a526262-3a20-4994-9dc2-1df6b5d6410e-1.png)

Increase the logo size in the Footer component (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx) by adjusting the width and height attributes or CSS classes applied to the logo image element (image_8a526262-3a20-4994-9dc2-1df6b5d6410e-1.png) to match the proportional increase applied in Navigation

Increase the logo size in the Navigation component (frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx) by 100 percent from the current h-16 size by changing the height class to h-32 and adjusting the container height from h-24 to h-40 proportionally

Increase the logo size in the Footer component (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx) by 100 percent from the current h-14 size by changing the height class to h-28 to match the proportional increase applied in Navigation
Reduce the height of white space at the top of the Home page (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx) by 50 percent by adjusting the padding or margin classes on the hero section or main container element

Add React Query hooks in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts for the new e-commerce backend functions: usePlaceOrder (mutation hook calling placeOrder), useGetAllOrders (query hook calling getAllOrders for the admin page), useGetOrderById (query hook calling getOrderById), and useUpdateOrderStatus (mutation hook calling updateOrderStatus).

Create a global shopping cart context/state in the frontend (e.g., frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx) that stores the list of cart items (each with productId, productName, variantName, quantity, unitPrice), exposes addToCart, removeFromCart, updateQuantity, clearCart, and cartTotal computed value. Wrap the App in this CartContext provider in frontend/src/App.tsx without modifying any immutable paths.

Add an 'Add to Cart' button on the ProductDetail page (frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx) that allows users to select a product variant and specify a quantity before adding the item to the cart. Show a quantity selector (numeric input with increment/decrement controls) and a variant selector if variants exist. Display a success toast notification when an item is added to the cart. Do not alter the existing product image, specifications, nutritional information, or product variants display sections.

Create a Cart page (frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx) accessible at the route '/cart'. It should list all cart items with product name, variant name, unit price (in ₹), quantity (editable), line total, and a remove button per item. Display the cart subtotal. Include a 'Proceed to Checkout' button that navigates to '/checkout', and an 'Continue Shopping' link back to '/products'. Show an empty cart message with a link to Products when the cart is empty.

Create a Checkout page (frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx) accessible at the route '/checkout'. It should display a form for buyer details (Name, Email, Phone Number) and a Shipping Address (Street, City, State, Pincode, Country). Show an order summary sidebar listing cart items, quantities, and total amount in ₹. On form submission, call the usePlaceOrder mutation hook to submit the order to the backend. On success, clear the cart and navigate to an order confirmation page at '/order-confirmation/:orderId' displaying the order ID and a thank-you message.

Add a cart icon button in the Navigation component header area that displays the current number of items in the cart as a badge. Clicking it navigates to '/cart'. Do not alter the existing logo size, navigation links, or mobile menu structure in frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx.

Update the Admin page (frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx) to include a second tab or section labelled 'Orders' alongside the existing 'Contact Submissions' section. The Orders section should display all orders fetched via useGetAllOrders in a table showing Order ID, Buyer Name, Email, Phone, Total Amount (₹), Status, and Date. Include a status update control per row (dropdown with pending/confirmed/processing/shipped/delivered/cancelled) that calls useUpdateOrderStatus when changed. Do not modify the existing contact submissions display.

Register the new Cart ('/cart'), Checkout ('/checkout'), and Order Confirmation ('/order-confirmation/$orderId') routes in frontend/src/App.tsx by adding the corresponding route definitions and lazy-loading the new page components. Do not alter any existing routes or layout structure.

Fix the useGetProductByCategory hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to ensure it calls the backend getProductByCategory function with the correct category slug derived from the URL productId parameter, handles loading and error states gracefully, and returns the product data to the ProductDetail page.

Fix the ProductDetail page (frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx) so that the variant selector is pre-populated with the product's variants fetched from the backend, the quantity selector defaults to 1 and allows increment/decrement, and the 'Add to Cart' button correctly calls addToCart from CartContext using the selected variant's name, unitPrice from the product's price field, and the current quantity. Ensure no regression to the existing product image, specifications, nutritional information, or product variants display sections.

Verify that product category card links on the Products page (frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx) use URL slugs ('rice', 'wheat', 'pulses', 'spices', 'processed-food-products', 'makhana') that exactly match the category values stored in backend ProductDetail records and the productId parameter extracted in the ProductDetail page and useGetProductByCategory hook.

Ensure all product variant image filenames referenced in backend ProductDetail records exist as static files under frontend/public/assets/generated/ so that variant images render correctly on both the Products page and ProductDetail page without 404 errors.

Save the uploaded logo image as 'Logo.png' in frontend/public/assets/generated/ and replace the existing logo image (image_8a526262-3a20-4994-9dc2-1df6b5d6410e-1.png) in the Navigation component (frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx) with this new Logo.png, ensuring it displays correctly in both desktop and mobile navigation views at the current h-32 size.

Replace the existing logo image (image_8a526262-3a20-4994-9dc2-1df6b5d6410e-1.png) in the Footer component (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx) with the newly uploaded Logo.png, ensuring consistent branding at the current h-28 size.

Replace the existing watermark logo image (image_8a526262-3a20-4994-9dc2-1df6b5d6410e.png) referenced in frontend/src/index.css with the newly uploaded Logo.png, so the watermark background across all pages uses the new logo.

Reduce the logo size in the Navigation component (frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx) by 25 percent from the current h-32 size by changing the height class to h-24 and adjusting the container height proportionally.

Reduce the logo size in the Footer component (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx) by 25 percent from the current h-28 size by changing the height class to h-21 (or the nearest Tailwind equivalent such as h-20) to match the proportional reduction applied in Navigation.

Update the Navigation component (frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx) to use the new Logo.png from /assets/generated/Logo.png, maintaining the current h-24 height class and container height, ensuring the logo displays correctly in both desktop and mobile navigation views without distortion.

Update the Footer component (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx) to use the new Logo.png from /assets/generated/Logo.png, maintaining the current h-20 height class, ensuring consistent branding without distortion.
Update the watermark background reference in frontend/src/index.css to use the new Logo.png (/assets/generated/Logo.png) so the watermark background across all pages uses the newly uploaded logo.

Audit the Navigation component (frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx) to determine why Logo.png is not loading. Verify the image src path resolves correctly to /assets/generated/Logo.png, confirm the file exists at frontend/public/assets/generated/Logo.png, and fix any broken path references, incorrect relative paths, or missing file issues so the logo displays correctly in both desktop and mobile navigation views at the current h-24 height class.

Audit the Footer component (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx) to determine why Logo.png is not loading. Verify the image src path resolves correctly to /assets/generated/Logo.png, confirm the file exists at frontend/public/assets/generated/Logo.png, and fix any broken path references or missing file issues so the logo displays correctly in the footer at the current h-20 height class.

Ensure the file Logo.png exists at frontend/public/assets/generated/Logo.png. If it is missing or named incorrectly (e.g., with spaces or different casing), regenerate or rename it to exactly Logo.png so both the Navigation and Footer components can resolve the asset correctly.

Restore the CartContext provider in frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx with full cart state management (addToCart, removeFromCart, updateQuantity, clearCart, cartTotal). Ensure the CartContext provider wraps the entire app in frontend/src/App.tsx so all pages have access to cart state.

Restore the Cart page at frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx accessible at the route '/cart'. It must list all cart items with product name, variant name, unit price (in ₹), editable quantity with increment/decrement controls, line total, and a remove button per item. Display the cart subtotal. Include a 'Proceed to Checkout' button navigating to '/checkout' and a 'Continue Shopping' link to '/products'. Show an empty cart message with a link to Products when the cart is empty.

Restore the Checkout page at frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx accessible at the route '/checkout'. It must display a form for buyer details (Name, Email, Phone Number) and a Shipping Address (Street, City, State, Pincode, Country), an order summary sidebar with cart items, quantities, and total amount in ₹. On form submission, call the usePlaceOrder mutation hook to submit the order to the backend. On success, clear the cart and navigate to '/order-confirmation/:orderId'.

Restore the Order Confirmation page at frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx accessible at the route '/order-confirmation/:orderId'. It must fetch and display order details (order ID, buyer info, status, shipping address, items) using useGetOrderById, and display a thank-you message.

Restore the 'Add to Cart' functionality on the ProductDetail page (frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx). Ensure a variant selector pre-populated with the product's variants, a quantity selector defaulting to 1 with increment/decrement controls, and an 'Add to Cart' button that calls addToCart from CartContext using the selected variant's name, unitPrice from the product's price field, and the current quantity. Display a success toast notification when an item is added. Do not alter existing product image, specifications, nutritional information, or product variants display sections.

Restore the cart icon button in the Navigation component (frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx) that displays the current number of items in the cart as a badge. Clicking it must navigate to '/cart'. Do not alter the existing logo size (h-24), navigation links, or mobile menu structure.

Ensure the React Query hooks for e-commerce are present and correct in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: usePlaceOrder (mutation calling placeOrder), useGetAllOrders (query calling getAllOrders), useGetOrderById (query calling getOrderById), and useUpdateOrderStatus (mutation calling updateOrderStatus). Verify each hook correctly interfaces with the backend actor methods.

Register the '/cart', '/checkout', and '/order-confirmation/$orderId' routes in frontend/src/App.tsx by adding the corresponding route definitions and lazy-loading the Cart, Checkout, and OrderConfirmation page components. Do not alter any existing routes or layout structure.

Diagnose and fix the Admin page (frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx) not loading. Investigate likely causes including missing or broken imports (CartContext, useGetAllOrders, useUpdateOrderStatus), TypeScript type errors, or missing route registration. Ensure the Admin page renders both the 'Contact Submissions' tab and the 'Orders' tab correctly, with the Orders tab fetching data via useGetAllOrders and status updates via useUpdateOrderStatus.

Reduce the logo size in the Navigation component (frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx) by 10 percent from the current h-24 height class by changing the height class to h-[86px] (or the nearest Tailwind equivalent such as h-20) and adjusting the container height proportionally.

Reduce the logo size in the Footer component (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx) by 10 percent from the current h-20 height class by changing the height class to h-[72px] (or the nearest Tailwind equivalent such as h-16 or h-[72px]) to match the proportional reduction applied in Navigation.

Reduce the logo size in the Navigation component (frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx) by 10 percent from the current h-[86px] height class by changing the height class to h-[77px] and adjusting the container height proportionally.

Reduce the logo size in the Footer component (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx) by 10 percent from the current h-[72px] height class by changing the height class to h-[65px] to match the proportional reduction applied in Navigation.

Ensure the CartContext provider in frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx is fully implemented with cart state management (addToCart, removeFromCart, updateQuantity, clearCart, cartTotal, itemCount) and that it wraps the entire app in frontend/src/App.tsx. Each cart item must contain productId, productName, variantName, quantity, and unitPrice.

Ensure all four e-commerce React Query hooks are present and correctly implemented in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: usePlaceOrder (mutation calling actor.placeOrder), useGetAllOrders (query calling actor.getAllOrders), useGetOrderById (query calling actor.getOrderById with orderId parameter), and useUpdateOrderStatus (mutation calling actor.updateOrderStatus). Each hook must correctly interface with the backend actor and handle loading/error states.

Restore the Cart page at frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx accessible at route '/cart'. It must list all cart items with product name, variant name, unit price (in ₹), editable quantity with increment/decrement controls, line total, and a remove button per item. Display the cart subtotal. Include a 'Proceed to Checkout' button navigating to '/checkout' and a 'Continue Shopping' link to '/products'. Show an empty cart message with a link to Products when the cart is empty.

Restore the Checkout page at frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx accessible at route '/checkout'. It must display a form for buyer details (Name, Email, Phone Number) and a Shipping Address (Street, City, State, Pincode, Country), and an order summary sidebar listing cart items, quantities, and total amount in ₹. On form submission, call the usePlaceOrder mutation to submit the order to the backend. On success, clear the cart and navigate to '/order-confirmation/$orderId'.

Restore the Order Confirmation page at frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx accessible at route '/order-confirmation/$orderId'. It must use useGetOrderById to fetch and display order details including order ID, buyer name, email, phone, status (with color-coded badge), shipping address, and itemized order items with quantities and prices. Display a prominent thank-you message. Handle loading and error states.

Restore the 'Add to Cart' functionality on the ProductDetail page (frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx). Ensure a variant selector pre-populated with the product's variants fetched from the backend, a quantity selector defaulting to 1 with increment/decrement controls, and an 'Add to Cart' button that calls addToCart from CartContext using the selected variant's name, unitPrice from the product's price field, and the current quantity. Display a success toast notification when an item is added. Do not alter existing product image, specifications, nutritional information, or product variants display sections.

Restore the cart icon button in the Navigation component (frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx) that displays the current item count from CartContext as a badge. Clicking the cart icon must navigate to '/cart'. Do not alter the existing logo size (h-[77px]), navigation links, or mobile menu structure.

Ensure the '/cart', '/checkout', and '/order-confirmation/$orderId' routes are registered in frontend/src/App.tsx with lazy-loaded Cart, Checkout, and OrderConfirmation page components. Do not alter any existing routes or layout structure.

Fix and fully restore the Admin page at frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx. It must render two tabs: (1) 'Contact Submissions' — displaying all contact form submissions fetched via useGetContactSubmissions (or equivalent hook) in a table showing Name, Email, Phone Number, Message, and User Type; (2) 'Orders' — displaying all orders fetched via useGetAllOrders in a table showing Order ID, Buyer Name, Email, Phone, Total Amount (₹), Status, and Date, with a per-row status update dropdown (pending/confirmed/processing/shipped/delivered/cancelled) calling useUpdateOrderStatus when changed. Resolve any import errors, TypeScript type errors, or missing hook issues that prevent the page from loading.

Add representative static images for the three wheat variants (Durum Wheat, Whole Wheat, Semolina) as generated assets under frontend/public/assets/generated/, and ensure the imageUrl values stored in the backend variants reference these correct paths (e.g., /assets/generated/wheat-durum.png, /assets/generated/wheat-whole.png, /assets/generated/wheat-semolina.png).

Update the ProductDetail page (frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx) to ensure that when viewing the wheat category (/products/wheat), the three variants (Durum Wheat, Whole Wheat, Semolina) are displayed in the existing Product Variants grid section with their names and images, and the nutritional information section correctly renders all per-gram nutritional values returned by the backend for wheat. Do not alter any existing layout sections (product image, specifications table, add-to-cart controls).

Fix the useGetProductByCategory hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to ensure it correctly passes the productId URL parameter (the category slug) as-is to the backend getProductByCategory call, enables the query only when productId is defined, and handles null/undefined responses from the backend by treating them as a 'not found' state rather than a crash.

Verify that every product category card link on the Products page (frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx) uses the URL slugs 'rice', 'wheat', 'pulses', 'spices', 'processed-food-products', and 'makhana' — exactly matching what is stored in backend ProductDetail category fields — and fix any mismatches found.

Generate static representative images for the three wheat variants as assets under frontend/public/assets/generated/: wheat-durum.png (Durum Wheat grain close-up), wheat-whole.png (Whole Wheat grain close-up), and wheat-semolina.png (Semolina flour texture), ensuring these filenames exactly match the imageUrl values stored in the backend wheat variants.

Update the ProductDetail page (frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx) to ensure that when viewing /products/wheat, the three variants (Durum Wheat, Whole Wheat, Semolina) are displayed in the Product Variants grid section with their names and images, and the nutritional information section correctly renders all per-gram nutritional values (calories, protein, carbohydrates, fat, fiber, minerals) returned by the backend for wheat. Do not alter any existing layout sections (product image, specifications table, add-to-cart controls).

Fix the useGetProductByCategory hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to correctly pass the productId URL parameter (the category slug) as-is to the backend getProductByCategory call, enable the query only when productId is defined, and treat null/undefined/empty responses from the backend as a 'not found' state without crashing.

Ensure the CartContext provider in frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx is fully implemented with cart state management (addToCart, removeFromCart, updateQuantity, clearCart, cartTotal, itemCount). Each cart item must contain productId, productName, variantName, quantity, and unitPrice. The CartContext provider must wrap the entire app in frontend/src/App.tsx.

Restore the Order Confirmation page at frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx accessible at route '/order-confirmation/$orderId'. It must display order details (order ID, buyer name, email, phone, status with color-coded badge, shipping address, and itemized order items with quantities and prices) retrieved from sessionStorage or via useGetOrderById. Display a prominent thank-you message. Handle loading and error states.

Fix and fully restore the Admin page at frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx. It must render two tabs: (1) 'Contact Submissions' displaying all contact form submissions in a table showing Name, Email, Phone Number, Message, and User Type; (2) 'Orders' displaying all orders fetched via useGetAllOrders in a table showing Order ID, Buyer Name, Email, Phone, Total Amount (₹), Status, and Date, with a per-row status update dropdown (pending/confirmed/processing/shipped/delivered/cancelled) calling useUpdateOrderStatus when changed. Resolve any import errors, TypeScript type errors, or missing hook issues that prevent the page from loading.

Generate representative static images for all new product variants (excluding the three wheat variants already generated) and place them under frontend/public/assets/generated/. Required images: rice-basmati.png, rice-sona-masoori.png, rice-ir64.png, rice-brown.png, rice-broken.png, pulses-chana-dal.png, pulses-moong-dal.png, pulses-masoor-dal.png, pulses-urad-dal.png, pulses-toor-dal.png, pulses-rajma.png, pulses-kabuli-chana.png, spices-turmeric.png, spices-red-chilli.png, spices-coriander.png, spices-cumin.png, spices-black-pepper.png, spices-cardamom.png, spices-ginger-powder.png, spices-fenugreek.png, processed-rice-flour.png, processed-wheat-flour.png, processed-besan.png, processed-poha.png, processed-roasted-chana.png, processed-vermicelli.png, makhana-regular.png, makhana-premium.png, makhana-roasted.png, makhana-powder.png. Filenames must exactly match the imageUrl values stored in the backend variant records.

Update the Products page (frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx) to display the full set of variants for each product category card (Rice, Wheat, Pulses, Spices, Processed Food Products, Makhana). Each category card must show all variant names and their corresponding images fetched from the backend ProductDetail records. The layout should show variants in a scrollable or grid sub-section within or below each category card, consistent with the existing variant display style. Do not alter the category card navigation links or overall page structure.

Update the ProductDetail page (frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx) to correctly render the expanded set of variants for all six product categories. The Product Variants grid section must display all variants returned by the backend for the selected category, showing each variant's name and image. The variant selector for the Add to Cart control must also be pre-populated with the full list of variants. Do not alter the existing product image, specifications table, nutritional information section, or add-to-cart controls.

Fix the Products page (frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx) to correctly fetch and display the full set of variants for each of the six product category cards (Rice, Wheat, Pulses, Spices, Processed Food Products, Makhana) from the backend. Each category card must show all variant names and their corresponding images in a scrollable or grid sub-section within or below the category card. The category card navigation links must use the exact URL slugs 'rice', 'wheat', 'pulses', 'spices', 'processed-food-products', and 'makhana'. Do not alter the overall page structure or category card navigation links.

Fix the ProductDetail page (frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx) and the useGetProductByCategory hook (frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts) to ensure all six product categories display their full variant list and product information. The hook must pass the productId URL parameter (category slug) as-is to the backend getProductByCategory call, enable the query only when productId is defined, and treat null/undefined/empty responses as a 'not found' state without crashing. The Product Variants grid section must display all variants returned by the backend, showing each variant's name and image. The variant selector for Add to Cart must be pre-populated with the full variant list. Do not alter existing product image, specifications table, nutritional information section, or add-to-cart controls.

Generate representative static images for all product variants that are missing from frontend/public/assets/generated/. Required images (filenames must exactly match the imageUrl values stored in the backend variant records): rice-basmati.png, rice-sona-masoori.png, rice-ir64.png, rice-brown.png, rice-broken.png, wheat-durum.png, wheat-whole.png, wheat-semolina.png, pulses-chana-dal.png, pulses-moong-dal.png, pulses-masoor-dal.png, pulses-urad-dal.png, pulses-toor-dal.png, pulses-rajma.png, pulses-kabuli-chana.png, spices-turmeric.png, spices-red-chilli.png, spices-coriander.png, spices-cumin.png, spices-black-pepper.png, spices-cardamom.png, spices-ginger-powder.png, spices-fenugreek.png, processed-rice-flour.png, processed-wheat-flour.png, processed-besan.png, processed-poha.png, processed-roasted-chana.png, processed-vermicelli.png, makhana-regular.png, makhana-premium.png, makhana-roasted.png, makhana-powder.png.

Rewrite the useGetProductByCategory hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to correctly call the backend actor's getProductByCategory function using the productId URL parameter (category slug) exactly as-is, enable the query only when productId is defined and non-empty, handle null/undefined/empty optional responses from the backend as a 'not found' state without throwing, and return the unwrapped product data to the ProductDetail page.

Rewrite the ProductDetail page (frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx) to correctly display product data fetched from the backend for any of the six categories. The page must: (1) extract the productId param from the URL using TanStack Router's useParams; (2) pass it to the useGetProductByCategory hook; (3) display a loading state while fetching; (4) display a clear 'Product not found' message when the query returns no data; (5) on success, render: product name, category, description, price in ₹, specifications table, nutritional information per gram in a dedicated section, a Product Variants grid showing all variants with their names and images, a variant selector pre-populated with all variants, a quantity selector defaulting to 1 with increment/decrement controls, and an Add to Cart button calling addToCart from CartContext. Do not remove or break any existing working section.

Fix and fully restore the Admin page at frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx. The page must render two tabs without any import errors or TypeScript type errors: (1) 'Contact Submissions' tab — fetches and displays all contact form submissions in a table showing Name, Email, Phone Number, Message, and User Type; (2) 'Orders' tab — fetches all orders via useGetAllOrders and displays them in a table showing Order ID, Buyer Name, Email, Phone, Total Amount (₹), Status, and Date, with a per-row status update dropdown (pending/confirmed/processing/shipped/delivered/cancelled) that calls useUpdateOrderStatus when changed. Audit all imports (useGetAllOrders, useUpdateOrderStatus, CartContext, and any hooks used for contact submissions) and fix any broken references, missing hooks, or TypeScript errors preventing the page from loading.

Generate representative static images for all product variants that may be missing from frontend/public/assets/generated/. Required filenames (must exactly match the imageUrl values stored in backend variant records): rice-basmati.png, rice-sona-masoori.png, rice-ir64.png, rice-brown.png, rice-broken.png, wheat-durum.png, wheat-whole.png, wheat-semolina.png, pulses-chana-dal.png, pulses-moong-dal.png, pulses-masoor-dal.png, pulses-urad-dal.png, pulses-toor-dal.png, pulses-rajma.png, pulses-kabuli-chana.png, spices-turmeric.png, spices-red-chilli.png, spices-coriander.png, spices-cumin.png, spices-black-pepper.png, spices-cardamom.png, spices-ginger-powder.png, spices-fenugreek.png, processed-rice-flour.png, processed-wheat-flour.png, processed-besan.png, processed-poha.png, processed-roasted-chana.png, processed-vermicelli.png, makhana-regular.png, makhana-premium.png, makhana-roasted.png, makhana-powder.png.

new_feature_requests.summary: Home page with hero section, services overview, product categories, supply chain model, and CTA
About Us page with vision, mission, and business model sections
Products page with categories: Rice, Wheat, Pulses, Spices, Processed Food Products
Farmer Network page with procurement, pricing, aggregation, quality, and digitization info
Exports page with quality assurance, packaging, logistics, trade support, and compliance
Contact Us page with form (Name, Email, Phone, Message, User Type) and professional footer
Store submitted contact form data in the backend, capturing Name, Email, Phone Number, Message, and User Type fields
Update the backend submitContactForm function to persist ContactFormEntry records in stable storage so submitted contact forms are permanently stored across canister upgrades
Add a backend query function to retrieve all stored contact form submissions, returning an array of ContactFormEntry records
Add admin page to view all contact form submissions
Add Makhana to product categories
Add images to all product categories and make them clickable to show detailed specifications with prices in rupees
Create a ProductDetail data model in the backend to store product specifications including product name, category, description, detailed specifications, and price in rupees
Add backend functions to store and retrieve product details, including a function to get all products and a function to get a specific product by ID or category
Update product detail pages to display nutritional information per gram alongside specifications and pricing
Add individual product images to each product detail page
Update the ProductDetail backend data model to include a nutritional information field that stores nutritional values per gram (e.g., calories, protein, carbohydrates, fat, fiber, vitamins, minerals)
Update the ProductDetail backend data model to include an imageUrl field for storing the path to each product's individual image
Display images of each product variant on the product detail pages (redirecting pages)

Update the ProductDetail backend data model to include a 'variants' field that stores an array of product variant objects, where each variant object contains a name/label string and an imageUrl string for the variant's image

Debug and fix the product detail page routing in frontend/src/App.tsx to ensure the productId parameter is correctly captured from the URL when users click on product category cards from the Products page
Add company logo to the website from attached image file
Add watermark image of a tractor in field to all pages
Add the company logo from the attached image file to the Navigation component (frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx), replacing the existing placeholder logo with the uploaded company logo image
Add the company logo from the attached image file to the Footer component (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx), replacing the existing placeholder logo with the uploaded company logo image
Replace existing tractor watermark with new uploaded watermark image on all pages
Display product variants with images for each product category on the Products page, matching the variants shown on the Home page
Make the watermark 30 percent darker and ensure it fits properly within the page dimensions
Diagnose and fix the deployment error that occurred during the previous network deployment attempt by reviewing canister configuration, dependencies, and build artifacts
Verify that the backend main.mo actor compiles correctly with all existing type definitions (ContactFormEntry, ProductDetail, NutritionData, ProductVariant) and function signatures
Make the watermark 50 percent darker (reduce opacity by 50 percent from current level)
Replace the current company logo with the newly attached logo image in Navigation and Footer components
Reduce the height of white space at the top of the Home page by 50 percent
Add e-commerce functionality to the existing website including shopping cart, product ordering/purchasing capability, and checkout flow
Fill white space areas on all pages with a rice and wheat field background image

Extend the backend Motoko actor (backend/main.mo) with e-commerce data models and functions: add an Order type containing orderId, buyerName, buyerEmail, buyerPhone, shippingAddress, items (array of OrderItem with productId, productName, variantName, quantity, unitPrice), totalAmount, status (pending/confirmed/processing/shipped/delivered/cancelled), and createdAt timestamp. Add stable storage for orders, and public functions: placeOrder (accepts buyer info, shipping address, and cart items; returns the created order), getOrderById (returns a specific order), getAllOrders (admin function to return all orders), and updateOrderStatus (updates the order status by orderId).

Audit the backend main.mo actor to ensure all six product categories (Rice, Wheat, Pulses, Spices, Processed Food Products, Makhana) have fully populated ProductDetail records with name, category slug, description, specifications, price, imageUrl, nutritionData, and variants (each with name and imageUrl). If any records are missing or incomplete, seed them with realistic representative data so every category returns valid data from getProductByCategory queries.
Save the uploaded FarmSiddhi logo image (ChatGPT Image Feb 25, 2026, 12_31_54 AM.png) as 'Logo.png' in frontend/public/assets/generated/, replacing any existing Logo.png file.
Restore missing e-commerce features (shopping cart, checkout, order confirmation, cart icon in nav, product add-to-cart) that were removed in a recent deployment
Fix the Admin page not loading - diagnose and resolve the issue preventing the Admin page from rendering correctly

Ensure the backend Motoko actor (backend/main.mo) contains the complete e-commerce data model and all required functions: Order type with orderId, buyerName, buyerEmail, buyerPhone, shippingAddress, items (array of OrderItem with productId, productName, variantName, quantity, unitPrice), totalAmount, status (pending/confirmed/processing/shipped/delivered/cancelled), and createdAt. Stable storage for orders. Public functions: placeOrder, getOrderById, getAllOrders, and updateOrderStatus. If any of these are missing or broken, restore them fully.

Audit and fix the backend Motoko actor (backend/main.mo) to ensure all e-commerce types and functions are fully present and correct: Order type with orderId, buyerName, buyerEmail, buyerPhone, shippingAddress (street, city, state, pincode, country), items (array of OrderItem with productId, productName, variantName, quantity, unitPrice), totalAmount, status (pending/confirmed/processing/shipped/delivered/cancelled), and createdAt timestamp. Stable storage for orders. Public functions: placeOrder (accepts buyer info, shipping address, cart items; returns created order), getOrderById (returns a specific order by orderId), getAllOrders (returns all orders for admin), and updateOrderStatus (updates order status by orderId). If any of these are missing, broken, or have type mismatches, restore them fully.
Add Wheat available varieties (Durum Wheat, Whole Wheat, Semolina) with nutritional details to the /products/wheat product detail page

Update the backend Motoko actor (backend/main.mo) to enrich the 'wheat' ProductDetail record with three product variants: Durum Wheat, Whole Wheat, and Semolina. Each variant must have a name and an imageUrl. The top-level ProductDetail record for the wheat category must also include a fully populated nutritionData field containing realistic per-gram nutritional values (calories, protein, carbohydrates, fat, fiber, and at least two minerals/vitamins). If a wheat ProductDetail record already exists in stable storage, update it in place; otherwise seed it.

Audit and fix the backend Motoko actor (backend/main.mo) to ensure the wheat ProductDetail record has the category slug exactly matching 'wheat', and that all six product categories (rice, wheat, pulses, spices, processed-food-products, makhana) have their category slugs stored exactly as those lowercase hyphenated strings so getProductByCategory lookups succeed.

Update the backend Motoko actor (backend/main.mo) to ensure the wheat ProductDetail record includes three product variants — Durum Wheat, Whole Wheat, and Semolina — each with a name and an imageUrl pointing to /assets/generated/wheat-durum.png, /assets/generated/wheat-whole.png, and /assets/generated/wheat-semolina.png respectively. The wheat ProductDetail must also include a fully populated nutritionData field with realistic per-gram values for calories, protein, carbohydrates, fat, fiber, iron, and zinc. If the wheat record already exists in stable storage, update it in place; otherwise seed it.

Write a migration module (backend/migration.mo) or use the actor's postupgrade hook to update the existing wheat ProductDetail record in stable storage with the three new variants and updated nutritionData, ensuring data persists across canister upgrades without losing existing product records for other categories.

Audit the backend main.mo actor to ensure all six ProductDetail records (rice, wheat, pulses, spices, processed-food-products, makhana) are seeded in stable storage with their category slugs stored exactly as lowercase hyphenated strings ('rice', 'wheat', 'pulses', 'spices', 'processed-food-products', 'makhana'). The getProductByCategory function must look up records by these exact slugs. If any records are missing or have mismatched category values, seed or correct them so every category returns valid data.

Update backend/migration.mo (or the actor's postupgrade hook in backend/main.mo) to re-seed or update all six ProductDetail records in stable storage if they are missing or have incorrect category slugs, ensuring the migration runs on upgrade without losing existing contact form or order data.

Verify and fix all product category card links on the Products page (frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx) to use URL slugs that exactly match the backend category values: 'rice', 'wheat', 'pulses', 'spices', 'processed-food-products', and 'makhana'. Fix any mismatches found.
Add all sub-categories/variants for all six product categories: Rice, Wheat, Spices, Pulses, Processed Food Products, and Makhana on the Products and ProductDetail pages

Update the backend Motoko actor (backend/main.mo) and migration module (backend/migration.mo) to enrich all six ProductDetail records with comprehensive variants. Rice: Basmati Rice, Sona Masoori, IR-64 Parboiled Rice, Brown Rice, Broken Rice. Wheat: Durum Wheat, Whole Wheat, Semolina (already seeded — ensure they persist). Pulses: Chana Dal, Moong Dal, Masoor Dal, Urad Dal, Toor Dal, Rajma, Kabuli Chana. Spices: Turmeric, Red Chilli, Coriander, Cumin, Black Pepper, Cardamom, Ginger Powder, Fenugreek. Processed Food Products: Rice Flour, Wheat Flour (Atta), Besan (Gram Flour), Poha (Flattened Rice), Roasted Chana, Vermicelli. Makhana: Fox Nut Regular, Fox Nut Premium, Roasted Makhana, Makhana Powder. Each variant must have a name (string) and imageUrl (string) pointing to /assets/generated/<category>-<variant-slug>.png. All six ProductDetail records must also retain fully populated nutritionData, specifications, description, price, and imageUrl fields. The migration must run on postupgrade without overwriting existing contact form or order data.

Audit and fix the backend Motoko actor (backend/main.mo) and migration module (backend/migration.mo) to ensure all six ProductDetail records are fully seeded in stable storage with correct category slugs ('rice', 'wheat', 'pulses', 'spices', 'processed-food-products', 'makhana') and comprehensive variants: Rice (Basmati Rice, Sona Masoori, IR-64 Parboiled Rice, Brown Rice, Broken Rice), Wheat (Durum Wheat, Whole Wheat, Semolina), Pulses (Chana Dal, Moong Dal, Masoor Dal, Urad Dal, Toor Dal, Rajma, Kabuli Chana), Spices (Turmeric, Red Chilli, Coriander, Cumin, Black Pepper, Cardamom, Ginger Powder, Fenugreek), Processed Food Products (Rice Flour, Wheat Flour/Atta, Besan/Gram Flour, Poha/Flattened Rice, Roasted Chana, Vermicelli), Makhana (Fox Nut Regular, Fox Nut Premium, Roasted Makhana, Makhana Powder). Each variant must have a name and imageUrl pointing to /assets/generated/<category>-<variant-slug>.png. Every ProductDetail record must retain fully populated nutritionData, specifications, description, price, and imageUrl. The getProductByCategory function must look up records by these exact lowercase hyphenated slugs. Migration must run on postupgrade without overwriting existing contact form or order data.

Audit the backend/main.mo actor and backend/migration.mo migration module to ensure all six ProductDetail records are seeded in stable storage with category slugs exactly matching 'rice', 'wheat', 'pulses', 'spices', 'processed-food-products', and 'makhana'. Each record must include: name, category (lowercase hyphenated slug), description, specifications, price, imageUrl, fully populated nutritionData (calories, protein, carbohydrates, fat, fiber, and at least two minerals), and variants with name and imageUrl. The getProductByCategory function must look up records by these exact slugs. The migration must run on postupgrade without overwriting existing contact form or order data. If any record is missing or has an incorrect slug, seed or correct it.

Verify that the CartContext provider in frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx is fully implemented with addToCart, removeFromCart, updateQuantity, clearCart, cartTotal, and itemCount, and that the CartProvider wraps the entire app in frontend/src/App.tsx. Each cart item must include productId, productName, variantName, quantity, and unitPrice. Ensure the '/cart', '/checkout', and '/order-confirmation/$orderId' routes are all registered in App.tsx with lazy-loaded Cart, Checkout, and OrderConfirmation components.
